# Prospera Mind — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A premium digital wellness product offering a bundle of 10 guided wealth meditation videos designed to rewire the subconscious mind for financial abundance. The brand exudes a dark, luxurious aesthetic — deep navy or black with gold accents — and positions itself at the intersection of neuroscience, sound frequency, and prosperity mindset coaching. The product is structured as a complete audio-visual journey, with each meditation targeting a specific psychological or energetic block to wealth. The tone is empowering, sophisticated, and results-driven, appealing to those who take their personal growth and financial transformation seriously.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Prospera Mind
A premium digital wellness product offering a bundle of 10 guided wealth meditation videos designed to rewire the subconscious mind for financial abundance. The brand exudes a dark, luxurious aesthetic — deep navy or black with gold accents — and positions itself at the intersection of neuroscience, sound frequency, and prosperity mindset coaching. The product is structured as a complete audio-visual journey, with each meditation targeting a specific psychological or energetic block to wealth. The tone is empowering, sophisticated, and results-driven, appealing to those who take their personal growth and financial transformation seriously.

## Target Audience
- People looking to shift their money mindset and attract abundance
- Money Mindset Seekers

## Industry
Wellness & Personal Development

---

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
